goal: Recommend the next features to add to the project based on current implemented capabilities and visible domain gaps.
constraints: Recommendations must stay grounded in current repo capabilities
Prefer high-leverage internal-tool features before ERP-scale expansion
acceptance_criteria: The recommendations are tailored to this project
The sequence explains what to build now versus later
product_acceptance_criteria: The advice should help decide the next actual sprint or release
The recommendations should build on the existing OCR + ledger + execution workflow
completion_language_policy: Only claim completion after the roadmap is repo-grounded and sequenced.
delivery_truth_contract: State recommendations as product judgment, not as implemented facts.
inferred_assumptions: The best next feature should deepen operational value quickly
The app is not yet at a full multi-role enterprise stage
